title: Warm Velvety Portuguese Chicken Bake
description: A rich and adventurous Portuguese dish featuring garlic granules and a mustardy velvety sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This paleo-friendly recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, garlic granules, dijon mustard, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and pour in the chicken broth and coconut cream.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
